full_text:
Zhang Wu 張武
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Wu (張武). Began pillaging the people of Jiangxia. Zhao Yun killed him with a spear thrust. Zhang Wu is a fictional character. Zhang Wu was affiliated with Liu Biao. Zhang Wu lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
